prompt: Stunning luxury home exterior at golden hour — large colonial with manicured lawn, stone walkway, warm interior light glowing through windows. Beacon Hill style. Warm tones — cream, wine-red shutters, golden light. No people. Real estate photography, wide angle, twilight shoot.
